title: Press wool for a clip
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Press wool for a clip demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for wool pressing

pcs.text: Check the wool press for safe operation, and lubricate and maintain it as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the wool press for safe operation, and lubricate and maintain it as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the wool press for safe operation, and lubricate and maintain it as required.

pcs.text: Inspect the work area to confirm it is free of all contaminants in readiness for pressing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect the work area to confirm it is free of all contaminants in readiness for pressing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect the work area to confirm it is free of all contaminants in readiness for pressing.

pcs.text: Confirm that supplies of wool packs, bale fasteners and hooks, stencils and bale-branding inks are located in appropriate place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that supplies of wool packs, bale fasteners and hooks, stencils and bale-branding inks are located in appropriate place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that supplies of wool packs, bale fasteners and hooks, stencils and bale-branding inks are located in appropriate place.

pcs.text: Identify the appropriate recording system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the appropriate recording system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the appropriate recording system.

pcs.text: Check the scales to be used for accuracy and calibrate if necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the scales to be used for accuracy and calibrate if necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the scales to be used for accuracy and calibrate if necessary.

pcs.text: Check the press and its location for safety in line with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the press and its location for safety in line with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the press and its location for safety in line with workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify any defective equipment and report to the appropriate person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify any defective equipment and report to the appropriate person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify any defective equipment and report to the appropriate person.

pcs.text: Identify the lines of wool and confirm with the Wool Classer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the lines of wool and confirm with the Wool Classer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the lines of wool and confirm with the Wool Classer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for wool pressing

elements.title: Press wool

pcs.text: Consult the Wool Classer to determine mob cut-outs and pressing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult the Wool Classer to determine mob cut-outs and pressing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult the Wool Classer to determine mob cut-outs and pressing requirements.

pcs.text: Apply safe work practices at all times and use available safety equipment in line with work health and safety (WHS) and following manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply safe work practices at all times and use available safety equipment in line with work health and safety (WHS) and following manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply safe work practices at all times and use available safety equipment in line with work health and safety (WHS) and following manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit.

pcs.text: Check wool for contamination and place any contaminants found in the appropriate location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check wool for contamination and place any contaminants found in the appropriate location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check wool for contamination and place any contaminants found in the appropriate location.

pcs.text: Check woolpacks for conformity in line with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check woolpacks for conformity in line with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check woolpacks for conformity in line with workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Seek directions for order of pressing and any special requirements from the Wool Classer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek directions for order of pressing and any special requirements from the Wool Classer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek directions for order of pressing and any special requirements from the Wool Classer.

pcs.text: Place all wool correctly and evenly in the press to produce even density bales
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place all wool correctly and evenly in the press to produce even density bales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place all wool correctly and evenly in the press to produce even density bales.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Press wool

elements.title: Carry out the role and responsibilities of the wool presser

pcs.text: Press bales to optimal weights and within specified weight and length dimensions in compliance with the industry code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Press bales to optimal weights and within specified weight and length dimensions in compliance with the industry code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Press bales to optimal weights and within specified weight and length dimensions in compliance with the industry code of practice.

pcs.text: Press lines to avoid mixed bales
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Press lines to avoid mixed bales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Press lines to avoid mixed bales.

pcs.text: Monitor wool flow and build-up in bins
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor wool flow and build-up in bins?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor wool flow and build-up in bins.

pcs.text: Maintain work area in a condition that avoids contamination of wool
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain work area in a condition that avoids contamination of wool?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain work area in a condition that avoids contamination of wool.

pcs.text: Carry out pressing within time restrictions and workflow of the wool room
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pressing within time restrictions and workflow of the wool room?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pressing within time restrictions and workflow of the wool room.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out the role and responsibilities of the wool presser

elements.title: Close and store bales

pcs.text: Use approved bale dividers as instructed, and fasten flaps correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use approved bale dividers as instructed, and fasten flaps correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use approved bale dividers as instructed, and fasten flaps correctly.

pcs.text: Identify bales for branding before removing them from the press in line with traceability requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify bales for branding before removing them from the press in line with traceability requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify bales for branding before removing them from the press in line with traceability requirements.

pcs.text: Store bales safely, avoiding injury to presser, risk to other workers, and damage to bales and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store bales safely, avoiding injury to presser, risk to other workers, and damage to bales and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store bales safely, avoiding injury to presser, risk to other workers, and damage to bales and equipment.

pcs.text: Store bales to maximise shed space and to avoid weather damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store bales to maximise shed space and to avoid weather damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store bales to maximise shed space and to avoid weather damage.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Close and store bales

elements.title: Complete recording requirements

pcs.text: Brand bales appropriately in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brand bales appropriately in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brand bales appropriately in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Weigh bales appropriately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh bales appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh bales appropriately.

pcs.text: Record bale weights, numbers and descriptions clearly using the appropriate recording system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record bale weights, numbers and descriptions clearly using the appropriate recording system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record bale weights, numbers and descriptions clearly using the appropriate recording system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete recording requirements
